utilities/highlight-links.js.description: Highlights all links on the page with a red outline.

utilities/remove-sticky.js.description: Removes all fixed and sticky positioned elements.

dev-tools/view-source.js.description: Opens the page source in a new window.

dev-tools/edit-page.js.description: Toggles contentEditable mode on the entire page.

editor/OpenTemplateManager.js.description: Åpner malen i TM modus (nytt vindu)

editor/DownloadIdml.js.description: Laster ned IDML-filen (kun i Edit og krever admin-innlogging)

editor/CopyGuid.js.description: Kopierer GUID for malen (kun i Edit)
